text:
In this subchapter:

(1) “Digital signature” means an electronic identifier intended by the person using it to have the same force and effect as the use of a manual signature.

(2) “License” means a license or permit for a commercial sign issued under Chapter 391 (Highway Beautification on Interstate and Primary Systems and Certain Roads) or for an off-premise sign issued under Chapter 394 (Regulation of Outdoor Signs on Rural Roads) .
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 201. Gen. Provisions & Admin.
##### § 201.931 — Definitions

In this subchapter:

    (1) “Digital signature” means an electronic identifier intended by the person using it to have the same force and effect as the use of a manual signature.

    (2) “License” means a license or permit for a commercial sign issued under Chapter 391 (Highway Beautification on Interstate and Primary Systems and Certain Roads) or for an off-premise sign issued under Chapter 394 (Regulation of Outdoor Signs on Rural Roads) .

*Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 964 (S.B.2006), Sec. 1, eff. June 15, 2017.*

subsections.text: “Digital signature” means an electronic identifier intended by the person using it to have the same force and effect as the use of a manual signature.

“License” means a license or permit for a commercial sign issued under Chapter 391 (Highway Beautification on Interstate and Primary Systems and Certain Roads) or for an off-premise sign issued under Chapter 394 (Regulation of Outdoor Signs on Rural Roads) .
